
```{ojs}
function dumbbell(inputData, inputWidth)  {

  const points = vl
    .markPoint({
      size: 100,
      opacity: 1,
      shape: "square",
      stroke: "transparent",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value")
        .axis({
          title: width > 600 ? "Bruttopension" : null,
          labels:  width > 600 ? true : false,
          ticks:  width > 600 ? true : false,
          domain: true,
          grid: false,
        })
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 5000],
          nice: false,
        }),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D")
        .axis({
          title: null,
          domain: false,
          labels: false,
          ticks: false,
          // minExtent: 80,
        })
        .scale({
          reverse: true,
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: colors2,
        })
        .legend({
          // orient: width > 825 ? "right" : "top", 
          orient: "top",
          symbolOpacity: 1,
          symbolType: "square",
          title: null, 
        }),
    )

  const lines = vl
    .markLine({
      opacity: 0.15,
      size: 5,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("D")
        .scale({
          range: ["black", "black"]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const text = vl
    .markText({
      size: 14,
      dy: 20,
      clip: true,
      align: "center",
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range: ["black"],
        }) 
        .legend(null),
      vl.text() 
        .fieldQ("value")
        .format(",.0f"), 
    )
    
  const textPerc = vl
    .markText({
      size: 14,
      dx: 20,
      dy: -14,
      align: "left",
      anchor: "middle",
      clip: true,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("gapPerc")
        .format(",.0~%"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("gesl")
        .scale({
          range : [0.51, 0]
        })
        .legend(null),
    )

  const textGap = vl
    .markText({
      size: 14,
      dx: 20,
      dy: -30,
      align: "left",
      anchor: "middle",
      clip: true,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .fieldQ("gapValue")
        .format(",.0~f"),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("gesl"),
    )

  const textArrow = vl
    .markText({
      size: 14,
      dx: 80,
      dy: -40, // rangeRaw < 3000 ? -35 : -40,
      align: "center",
      clip: true,
    })
    .encode(
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("value"),
      vl.y()
        .fieldO("D"),
      vl.text()
        .value(["Gender", "⤺ Gap"]),
      vl.opacity()
        .fieldN("gesl"),
    )

    const layers = width > 600 ? 
      vl.layer(
        lines,
        points,
        text,
        //textRel, 
        textGap,
        textPerc,
        textArrow,
      ) :
      vl.layer(
        lines,
        points,
        //textRel,
        textGap,
        textPerc,
        textArrow,
        // text,
      )

  return layers
    .height(width > 600 ? 200 : 180)
    .width(makeWidth(width))
    // .facet({
    //   field: "D", 
    //   type: "nominal", 
    //   title: null,
    //   header: { 
    //     labelFontSize: 14, 
    //     labelOrient: "top",
    //   },
    // })
    .data(inputData)
    .config(config)

}
```
